case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. ARNULFO E ESCALA et al

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-17-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
